Ivy[edit | edit source]
Picture
Name
Quotes
Spawn Code
Ivy
“Kind of clingy.”
–Wilson
“Yawn.”
–Willow
“Is plant.”
–Wolfgang
“Like death, it creeps everywhere.”
–Wendy
“INVADING ORGANIC LIFEFORMS!”
–WX-78
“Something in the Hedera family.”
–Wickerbottom
“Pretty enough.”
–Woodie
“Creeping ivy.”
–Maxwell
“It climbeth the walls.”
–Wigfrid
“Ivy grows everywhere.”
–Webber
“Frizzy hair friend”
–Wormwood
“That stuff can ruin good architecture.”
–Winona
“Creeping ivy, growing strong.”
–Wortox
“Creepy crawly.”
–Wurt
“Kind of clingy.”
–Walter
“Kind of clingy.”
–Wanda
"quagmire_altar_ivy"
Beast of Hunger[edit | edit source]
Picture
Name
Quotes
Spawn Code
Beast of Hunger
“It's an old statue.”
–Wilson
“Haha! Look at this dumb goat statue.”
–Willow
“Nice stone lady.”
–Wolfgang
“What horror have those eyes witnessed?”
–Wendy
“IT IS A HIDEOUS GOAT STATUE”
–WX-78
“Decrepit statuary.”
–Wickerbottom
“I'm not huge on art.”
–Woodie
“I do like a good statue.”
–Maxwell
“Servant öf a terrible göd.”
–Wigfrid
“It looks like the friendly goat we met.”
–Webber
“Oh. Not alive”
–Wormwood
“It probably looked real nice once.”
–Winona
“A monumental statue! Hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Look creepy...”
–Wurt
“It's an old statue.”
–Walter
“It's an old statue.”
–Wanda
"quagmire_altar_statue1"
Beast of Hunger
“What are you looking at?”
–Wilson
“Ew. It's ugly.”
–Willow
“Is silly statue. Wolfgang not afraid.”
–Wolfgang
“Yet another reminder of death.”
–Wendy
“UNNECESSARILY UGLY”
–WX-78
“A gruesome gargoyle.”
–Wickerbottom
“Sure are a lot of statues around here.”
–Woodie
“Misdirected dedication.”
–Maxwell
“'Tis dedicated tö its göd.”
–Wigfrid
“A lotta goat statues around here.”
–Webber
“Moss friend house”
–Wormwood
“I wonder who chiseled that.”
–Winona
“No relation.”
–Wortox
“What red eyes it have...”
–Wurt
“What are you looking at?”
–Walter
“What are you looking at?”
–Wanda
"quagmire_altar_statue2"
Queen Beast[edit | edit source]
Picture
Name
Quotes
Spawn Code
Queen Beast
“A monumental monument.”
–Wilson
“What's so great about her?”
–Willow
“Is big lady.”
–Wolfgang
“I am not impressed by opulence.”
–Wendy
“EXCESSIVE ORNAMENTATION”
–WX-78
“Impressive in scope.”
–Wickerbottom
“That must have taken some time to make.”
–Woodie
“A bit excessive...”
–Maxwell
“A cölössal queen.”
–Wigfrid
“Wow. She looks beautiful.”
–Webber
“Tall Still Floppy Ear”
–Wormwood
“Woo-wee. Impress-ive.”
–Winona
“My vessel is not her vassal.”
–Wortox
“She look nice.”
–Wurt
“A monumental monument.”
–Walter
“A monumental monument.”
–Wanda
"quagmire_altar_queen"
Gnaw Worshippers[edit | edit source]
Picture
Name
Quotes
Spawn Code
Gnaw Worshipper
“Take that, creature!”
–Wilson
“Gross.”
–Willow
“Is scary.”
–Wolfgang
“It's winged, but it's no angel.”
–Wendy
“USELESS ORGANIC DECORATION”
–WX-78
“Quite an interesting sculpture.”
–Wickerbottom
“Not as pretty as Lucy.”
–Woodie
“Some kind of gargoyle.”
–Maxwell
“'Tis a Valkyrie.”
–Wigfrid
“I think it's sort of pretty.”
–Webber
“Scary Floppy Ear”
–Wormwood
“Gives me the heebie jeebies.”
–Winona
“I could draw a little moustache on it when no one's looking.”
–Wortox
“Don't like it.”
–Wurt
“Take that, creature!”
–Walter
“Take that, creature!”
–Wanda
"quagmire_park_angel"
Gnaw Worshipper
“So lifelike.”
–Wilson
“Ugly.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang don't like.”
–Wolfgang
“Abigail needs a statue.”
–Wendy
“YOUR MONUMENTS DO NOT UNDO DEATH”
–WX-78
“Rather ghoulish monument.”
–Wickerbottom
“To each his own.”
–Woodie
“Well that's attractive.”
–Maxwell
“'Tis a Valkyrie.”
–Wigfrid
“It almost looks real.”
–Webber
“Scary Floppy Ear”
–Wormwood
“Kinda creepy.”
–Winona
“This one's already got a beard.”
–Wortox
“Is creepy...”
–Wurt
“So lifelike.”
–Walter
“So lifelike.”
–Wanda
"quagmire_park_angel2"
Broken Carriage[edit | edit source]
Picture
Name
Quotes
Spawn Code
Broken Carriage
“On the road to nowhere.”
–Wilson
“It's so busted, I don't even wanna light it on fire.”
–Willow
“Is not work.”
–Wolfgang
“It's been forgotten.”
–Wendy
“NONFUNCTIONING MOBILITY CHASSIS”
–WX-78
“The remnants of a once thriving culture.”
–Wickerbottom
“Huh. Wonder what happened here?”
–Woodie
“Carriage carnage.”
–Maxwell
“'Twas pillaged löng agö.”
–Wigfrid
“I wish we could ride in that.”
–Webber
“Where going?”
–Wormwood
“Never thought I'd say this, but it's beyond repair.”
–Winona
“Which squeaky wheel will get the grease?”
–Wortox
“What this thing?”
–Wurt
“On the road to nowhere.”
–Walter
“On the road to nowhere.”
–Wanda
"quagmire_rubble_carriage"
Dilapidated[edit | edit source]
Picture
Name
Quotes
Spawn Code
Dilapidated Cathedral
“Preyed upon.”
–Wilson
“What a waste. It could've burned down.”
–Willow
“Someone is smashed it.”
–Wolfgang
“Nothing more to pray for.”
–Wendy
“ERROR 404: CATHEDRAL NOT FOUND”
–WX-78
“Interesting. It appears they didn't worship Gnaw.”
–Wickerbottom
“Kinda scary, eh?”
–Woodie
“They didn't pray hard enough.”
–Maxwell
“'Twas the site öf a viciöus raid.”
–Wigfrid
“We can't even fix it.”
–Webber
“Oh. Fell down”
–Wormwood
“Well I sure ain't goin' in it now.”
–Winona
“It all comes tumbling down.”
–Wortox
“Mermfolk have story passed down... about mouth in the sky...”
–Wurt
“Preyed upon.”
–Walter
“Preyed upon.”
–Wanda
"quagmire_rubble_cathedral"
Dilapidated Chimney
“Something put a damper on that chimney.”
–Wilson
“What's a chimney without a fireplace?”
–Willow
“Wolfgang will punch whatever did this.”
–Wolfgang
“This was once a happy home.”
–Wendy
“FIREPLACE NO LONGER COMFORTING”
–WX-78
“Something must have knocked it down.”
–Wickerbottom
“Nothing left of a fireplace.”
–Woodie
“Something has happened here.”
–Maxwell
“It hath fallen.”
–Wigfrid
“Bummer.”
–Webber
“What's happened?”
–Wormwood
“It's broken. I can't fix it.”
–Winona
“It all comes tumbling down.”
–Wortox
“Nobody live here anymore?”
–Wurt
“Something put a damper on that chimney.”
–Walter
“Something put a damper on that chimney.”
–Wanda
"quagmire_rubble_chimney"
Dilapidated Chimney
“Something put a damper on that chimney.”
–Wilson
“Ugh! It won't even burn.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang not do this. But Wolfgang could.”
–Wolfgang
“Its hearth no longer has a home.”
–Wendy
“NONFUNCTIONING GOODS”
–WX-78
“It's crumbling.”
–Wickerbottom
“Too bad, eh?”
–Woodie
“Nobody has kept up with repairs.”
–Maxwell
“Nöthing öf value remains.”
–Wigfrid
“Aw. That's too bad.”
–Webber
“Not working”
–Wormwood
“Needs a lot more love than I got to give it.”
–Winona
“Tumbley, rumbley, falling right down.”
–Wortox
“Nobody live here anymore?”
–Wurt
“Something put a damper on that chimney.”
–Walter
“Something put a damper on that chimney.”
–Wanda
"quagmire_rubble_chimney2"
Dilapidated Clocktower
“That clock's been punched.”
–Wilson
“That would look better on fire.”
–Willow
“Is working? No is not working.”
–Wolfgang
“Time is death's ally.”
–Wendy
“DAMAGED BRICK COMPUTER TOWER”
–WX-78
“The clockwork has seized as well.”
–Wickerbottom
“That's a shame.”
–Woodie
“A late clocktower.”
–Maxwell
“The time is nigh!”
–Wigfrid
“I don't think that clock works anymore.”
–Webber
“Broken”
–Wormwood
“Looks like something destroyed it.”
–Winona
“The hands have stopped. Time is difficult to grasp.”
–Wortox
“All broken up.”
–Wurt
“That clock's been punched.”
–Walter
“That clock's been punched.”
–Wanda
"quagmire_rubble_clocktower"
Dilapidated Door
“No longer a-door-able.”
–Wilson
“It'd be better if it was burnt.”
–Willow
“Is not going nowhere.”
–Wolfgang
“A door that leads nowhere.”
–Wendy
“ERROR: INVALID PATHWAY”
–WX-78
“The door to a public house.”
–Wickerbottom
“Such a shame.”
–Woodie
“If only it lead somewhere.”
–Maxwell
“It önce led tö adventure. Alas, nö möre.”
–Wigfrid
“It doesn't lead anywhere anymore.”
–Webber
“Go anywhere? No”
–Wormwood
“Even I can't fix it.”
–Winona
“A door to nowhere, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“It all broken.”
–Wurt
“No longer a-door-able.”
–Walter
“No longer a-door-able.”
–Wanda
"quagmire_rubble_pubdoor"
Dilapidated House
“No one's here.”
–Wilson
“It's like there was a Great Fire, without the fire.”
–Willow
“Is no one here.”
–Wolfgang
“Death has been here.”
–Wendy
“LIKELY REASON FOR ABANDONMENT: ANNIHILATION”
–WX-78
“What creatures once lived here?”
–Wickerbottom
“Somethin' happened here, Lucy.”
–Woodie
“No one's living there anymore.”
–Maxwell
“Pillaged. But by what?”
–Wigfrid
“Where did everyone go?”
–Webber
“No one's here.”
–Warly
“Hello?”
–Wormwood
“Something happened here.”
–Winona
“Rubble, ruin!”
–Wortox
“Hellooooo?”
–Wurt
“No one's here.”
–Walter
“No one's here.”
–Wanda
“Something destroyed this town.”
–Wilson
“There's no one here. Boring.”
–Willow
“Someone crushed homes.”
–Wolfgang
“It's a ghost town.”
–Wendy
“VILLAGE HAS BEEN ABANDONED”
–WX-78
“There's nothing left of the inhabitants.”
–Wickerbottom
“I wonder what they did wrong.”
–Woodie
“Such destruction.”
–Maxwell
“If only they'd had a warrior to fight for them.”
–Wigfrid
“I wonder what happened here?”
–Webber
“Something destroyed this town.”
–Warly
“Anyone home?”
–Wormwood
“Ain't no one here anymore.”
–Winona
“No souls to see.”
–Wortox
“Glurph... it feel spooky here.”
–Wurt
“Something destroyed this town.”
–Walter
“Something destroyed this town.”
–Wanda
“I wonder who they angered.”
–Wilson
“I wish this would burn.”
–Willow
“Must have made something angry.”
–Wolfgang
“Some tragedy has struck this house.”
–Wendy
“EVIDENCE OF DIVINE WRATH”
–WX-78
“What caused this city to crumble?”
–Wickerbottom
“Gotta be pretty angry to destroy someone's home.”
–Woodie
“Nothing like the decline of a civilization.”
–Maxwell
“What foul being caused such destruction?”
–Wigfrid
“Looks like everyone left.”
–Webber
“I wonder who they angered.”
–Warly
“Oh. No one here”
–Wormwood
“Something busted this town.”
–Winona
“Huff and puff, and blow your house down!”
–Wortox
“Nobody home, flort.”
–Wurt
“I wonder who they angered.”
–Walter
“I wonder who they angered.”
–Wanda
"quagmire_rubble_house"
Dilapidated Roof
“Someone hit the roof.”
–Wilson
“The roof isn't on fire.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang lift it, then Wolfgang have roof over head.”
–Wolfgang
“The roof cannot protect you when death comes.”
–Wendy
“ROOF NO LONGER FUNCTIONS”
–WX-78
“It has collapsed.”
–Wickerbottom
“That doesn't look right.”
–Woodie
“It's no longer over anyone's head.”
–Maxwell
“It öffers nö sanctuary.”
–Wigfrid
“Too bad.”
–Webber
“No one home”
–Wormwood
“I've repaired roofs before but this is a lost cause.”
–Winona
“It all comes tumbling down.”
–Wortox
“Was there fight? Look like Goatfolk lose.”
–Wurt
“Someone hit the roof.”
–Walter
“Someone hit the roof.”
–Wanda
"quagmire_rubble_roof"
Pig House[edit | edit source]
Picture
Name
Quotes
Spawn Code
Worn Pig House
“It's seen better days.”
–Wilson
“It's just asking to be burned down.”
–Willow
“Wimpy house for hairy pigs.”
–Wolfgang
“I see no joy in this house.”
–Wendy
“HA HA. THEIR HOUSES ARE TERRIBLE”
–WX-78
“Tsk! What disrepair.”
–Wickerbottom
“Home sweet home, eh?”
–Woodie
“It could use renovations.”
–Maxwell
“Lödgings öf mine enemy.”
–Wigfrid
“I've never seen their houses up close!”
–Webber
“Anyone home?”
–Wormwood
“Plain shoddy worksmanship.”
–Winona
“A house that's cobbled from bits and bobs.”
–Wortox
“Glurgh, it smell like Pigfolk!”
–Wurt
“It's seen better days.”
–Walter
“It's seen better days.”
–Wanda
"quagmire_swampig_house"
House Rubble
“Some pig's house was ruined.”
–Wilson
“Hey pigs! Your house blew down!”
–Willow
“Little house is ruined.”
–Wolfgang
“Neither a house nor a home.”
–Wendy
“THE DESTROYED DWELLING OF AN ORGANIC”
–WX-78
“This house is no longer livable.”
–Wickerbottom
“Just rocks, now.”
–Woodie
“It's been a long time since this stood properly.”
–Maxwell
“Laid tö ruin.”
–Wigfrid
“No one lives in it anymore.”
–Webber
“Oh. Broken”
–Wormwood
“It might have been a house, once.”
–Winona
“Nothing but bits and bobs left.”
–Wortox
“Ha ha! Pig house all broken.”
–Wurt
“Some pig's house was ruined.”
–Walter
“Some pig's house was ruined.”
–Wanda
"quagmire_swampig_house_rubble"
Fountain[edit | edit source]
Picture
Name
Quotes
Spawn Code
Fountain
“Been a long time since it was hooked up to water.”
–Wilson
“A fountain with no water. Maybe that's a metaphor?”
–Willow
“There is no water for little birdies.”
–Wolfgang
“Long dry.”
–Wendy
“THANK GOODNESS. IT IS BROKEN”
–WX-78
“A pity. I always enjoyed a good fountain.”
–Wickerbottom
“This fountain's really old.”
–Woodie
“Just useless rubble now.”
–Maxwell
“Water öf life! But nö water!”
–Wigfrid
“No coins in it. I guess no one made wishes.”
–Webber
“Where's water?”
–Wormwood
“Under-used 'n overgrown.”
–Winona
“How disappointing, it's all dried up.”
–Wortox
“Aww... no water to splash in.”
–Wurt
“Been a long time since it was hooked up to water.”
–Walter
“Been a long time since it was hooked up to water.”
–Wanda
"quagmire_park_fountain"

Picture
Name
Quotes
Spawn Code
Iron Fence
“The scientific term is: "Sharp pointy thing".”
–Wilson
“That looks sharp.”
–Willow
“Is pointy spiky thing.”
–Wolfgang
“Looks dangerous.”
–Wendy
“DECORATIVE SHARP OBJECT”
–WX-78
“Wrought iron, it seems.”
–Wickerbottom
“Yeesh.”
–Woodie
“Spikey. Like me.”
–Maxwell
“'Tis a fencing spear.”
–Wigfrid
“It looks sharp.”
–Webber
“Clinky sharp!”
–Wormwood
“Nice metalwork.”
–Winona
“A wall, a wall, so very tall.”
–Wortox
“Look real pointy.”
–Wurt
“The scientific term is: "Sharp pointy thing".”
–Walter
“The scientific term is: "Sharp pointy thing".”
–Wanda

Iron Gate
“Turns out a key was the key to getting in.”
–Wilson, while opened
“Didn't even have to melt the locks.”
–Willow, while opened
“What nice things is in pink park?”
–Wolfgang, while opened
“Now I may enter the park.”
–Wendy, while opened
“PARKING ACCESS: GRANTED”
–WX-78, while opened
“We should have full access now.”
–Wickerbottom, while opened
“In we go.”
–Woodie, while opened
“Seems we've got it open.”
–Maxwell, while opened
“Valhalla's gate is öpened tö me.”
–Wigfrid, while opened
“Park. Park. Park!”
–Webber, while opened
“Open now”
–Wormwood, while opened
“Can't keep me outta nothing.”
–Winona, while opened
“This way to the park!”
–Wortox, while opened
“Better be good stuff in here.”
–Wurt, while opened
“Turns out a key was the key to getting in.”
–Walter, while opened
“Turns out a key was the key to getting in.”
–Wanda, while opened
“Locked tight.”
–Wilson, while locked
“I can't even burn it open!”
–Willow, while locked
“Is needing key.”
–Wolfgang, while locked
“I need a key to enter.”
–Wendy, while locked
“REQUIRES A PASSKEY”
–WX-78, while locked
“It needs a key to open.”
–Wickerbottom, while locked
“We need a key to open it.”
–Woodie, while locked
“It needs a key.”
–Maxwell, while locked
“Thöu shalt nöt keep me öut!”
–Wigfrid, while locked
“It's locked. I think we need a key.”
–Webber, while locked
“Where key?”
–Wormwood, while locked
“Needs a key.”
–Winona, while locked
“Let me out! Hyuyu, just kidding.”
–Wortox, while locked
“Lemme iiiin!!”
–Wurt, while locked
“Locked tight.”
–Walter, while locked
“Locked tight.”
–Wanda, while locked
"quagmire_park_gate"
Post[edit | edit source]
Picture
Name
Quotes
Spawn Code
Post
“As far as posts go, this one is adequate.”
–Wilson
“Boring.”
–Willow
“Is post.”
–Wolfgang
“A post. Not very exciting.”
–Wendy
“LOG POST”
–WX-78
“A nice enough bollard.”
–Wickerbottom
“Can't chop that.”
–Woodie
“It's a post.”
–Maxwell
“'Tis a pöst. Unwörthy öf mine attentiön.”
–Wigfrid
“It's nice enough.”
–Webber
“Clinky stump”
–Wormwood
“Nice metalwork.”
–Winona
“Nothing of interest to me, I see.”
–Wortox
“Not that interesting, florp.”
–Wurt
“As far as posts go, this one is adequate.”
–Walter
“As far as posts go, this one is adequate.”
–Wanda
"quagmire_altar_bollard"
Stone Pillar[edit | edit source]
Picture
Name
Quotes
Spawn Code
Stone Pillar
“A monumental monument.”
–Wilson
“It's stone. I can't burn it.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang could lift it.”
–Wolfgang
“A monument. But not to Abigail.”
–Wendy
“I ENJOY THE GEOMETRY OF THIS”
–WX-78
“I wish I could read the writing.”
–Wickerbottom
“A fine monument to something.”
–Woodie
“It's a monument to death.”
–Maxwell
“'Tis a runestöne.”
–Wigfrid
“It's a monument or something.”
–Webber
“Tall sharp stone”
–Wormwood
“Nice stonework.”
–Winona
“Nothing fun to find here.”
–Wortox
“Big stone thing.”
–Wurt
“A monumental monument.”
–Walter
“A monumental monument.”
–Wanda
"quagmire_park_obelisk"
Streetlight[edit | edit source]
Picture
Name
Quotes
Spawn Code
Streetlight
“Huh. Reminds me of home.”
–Wilson
“Just an old lamp post.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang loves lamp.”
–Wolfgang
“It sheds light on nothing important.”
–Wendy
“A POTENTIAL ALLY AGAINST THE ORGANICS”
–WX-78
“What is it powered by, I wonder?”
–Wickerbottom
“It don't have an off switch.”
–Woodie
“A touch of civility.”
–Maxwell
“Tis a magic light, surely.”
–Wigfrid
“It's the kind of lamp they have in the city.”
–Webber
“Bright light!”
–Wormwood
“That'd be a street lamp. Yep.”
–Winona
“If it were raining I could sing!”
–Wortox
“Ooooooh, glowy!”
–Wurt
“Huh. Reminds me of home.”
–Walter
“Huh. Reminds me of home.”
–Wanda
"quagmire_lamp_post"
Small Streetlight
“Enlightening.”
–Wilson
“Whatever. It's a lamp.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang loves lamp.”
–Wolfgang
“The only light in my life is Abigail.”
–Wendy
“AN ADOLESCENT METAL MACHINE”
–WX-78
“It's a nice enough light.”
–Wickerbottom
“Just wastes electricity.”
–Woodie
“A little civility.”
–Maxwell
“'Tis a magic light öf shört stature.”
–Wigfrid
“We're almost as tall as this lamp.”
–Webber
“Light stick”
–Wormwood
“That's a light.”
–Winona
“If it were raining I could sing!”
–Wortox
“Is fancy light.”
–Wurt
“Enlightening.”
–Walter
“Enlightening.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Tổng hợp các công trình xuất hiện trong sự kiện The Gorge, gồm nhà, hàng rào, đài phun nước, cột, đèn đường, xe và các vật thể trang trí.
title: The Gorge Structures

Hyuyu! |wormwood = Oh. Not alive |wurt = Look creepy... |walter = It's an old statue. |wanda = It's an old statue. |choose = wilson }} | "quagmire_altar_statue1" |- | [[File:Beast of Hunger 2.png|100px]] | Beast of Hunger |{{Quotes |wilson = What are you looking at? |willow = Ew. I can't fix it. |wortox = It all comes tumbling down. |wormwood = What's happened? |wurt = Nobody live here anymore? |walter = Something put a damper on that chimney. |wanda = Something put a damper on that chimney. |choose = wilson }} | "quagmire_rubble_chimney" |- | [[File:Dilapidated Chimney 2.png|100px]] | Dilapidated Chimney |{{Quotes |wilson = Something put a damper on that chimney. |willow = Ugh! But Wolfgang could. |wendy = Its hearth no longer has a home. |wx78 = NONFUNCTIONING GOODS |wickerbottom = It's crumbling. |woodie = Too bad, eh? |maxwell = Nobody has kept up with repairs. |wigfrid = Nöthing öf value remains. |webber = Aw. Time is difficult to grasp. |wormwood = Broken |wurt = All broken up. |walter = That clock's been punched. |wanda = That clock's been punched. |choose = wilson }} | "quagmire_rubble_clocktower" |- | [[File:Dilapidated Door.png|100px]] | Dilapidated Door |{{Quotes |wilson = No longer a-door-able. |willow = It'd be better if it was burnt. |wolfgang = Is not going nowhere. |wendy = A door that leads nowhere. |wx78 = ERROR: INVALID PATHWAY |wickerbottom = The door to a public house. |woodie = Such a shame. |maxwell = If only it lead somewhere. |wigfrid = It önce led tö adventure. But by what? |webber = Where did everyone go? |warly = No one's here. |wormwood = Hello? |wortox = Rubble, ruin! |wurt = Hellooooo? |winona = Something happened here. |walter = No one's here. |wanda = No one's here. |choose = wendy}}
{{Quotes |wilson = Something destroyed this town. |willow = There's no one here. Boring. |wolfgang = Someone crushed homes. |wendy = It's a ghost town. |wx78 = VILLAGE HAS BEEN ABANDONED |wickerbottom = There's nothing left of the inhabitants. |woodie = I wonder what they did wrong. |maxwell = Such destruction. |wigfrid = If only they'd had a warrior to fight for them. |webber = I wonder what happened here? |warly = Something destroyed this town. |wormwood = Anyone home? |wortox = No souls to see. |wurt = Glurph... it feel spooky here. |winona = Ain't no one here anymore. |walter = Something destroyed this town. |wanda = Something destroyed this town. |choose = wendy}}

No one here |wortox = Huff and puff, and blow your house down! |wurt = Nobody home, flort. |winona = Something busted this town. |walter = I wonder who they angered. |wanda = I wonder who they angered. |choose = wendy}} | "quagmire_rubble_house" |- | [[File:Dilapidated Roof.png|100px]] | Dilapidated Roof |{{Quotes |wilson = Someone hit the roof. |willow = The roof isn't on fire. |wolfgang = Wolfgang lift it, then Wolfgang have roof over head. |wendy = The roof cannot protect you when death comes. |wx78 = ROOF NO LONGER FUNCTIONS |wickerbottom = It has collapsed. |woodie = That doesn't look right. |maxwell = It's no longer over anyone's head. |wigfrid = It öffers nö sanctuary. |webber = Too bad. |winona = I've repaired roofs before but this is a lost cause. |wortox = It all comes tumbling down. |wormwood = No one home |wurt = Was there fight? THEIR HOUSES ARE TERRIBLE |wickerbottom = Tsk! What disrepair. |woodie = Home sweet home, eh? |maxwell = It could use renovations. |wigfrid = Lödgings öf mine enemy. |webber = I've never seen their houses up close! |winona = Plain shoddy worksmanship. |wortox = A house that's cobbled from bits and bobs. |wormwood = Anyone home? |wurt = Glurgh, it smell like Pigfolk! |walter = It's seen better days. |wanda = It's seen better days. |choose = wilson }} | "quagmire_swampig_house" |- | [[File:House Rubble.png|100px]] | House Rubble |{{Quotes |wilson = Some pig's house was ruined. |willow = Hey pigs! I always enjoyed a good fountain. |woodie = This fountain's really old. |maxwell = Just useless rubble now. |wigfrid = Water öf life! But nö water! |webber = No coins in it. I guess no one made wishes. |winona = Under-used 'n overgrown. |wortox = How disappointing, it's all dried up. |wormwood = Where's water? |wurt = Aww... no water to splash in. |walter = Been a long time since it was hooked up to water. |wanda = Been a long time since it was hooked up to water. |choose = wilson }} | "quagmire_park_fountain" |} ==Iron Fence== {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center; width: 100%" |- ! scope="col" style="width: 15%" | Picture ! scope="col" style="width: 15%" | Name ! scope="col" style="width: 55%" | Quotes ! scope="col" style="width: 15%" | Spawn Code |- |[[File:Iron Fence.png|50px]][[File:Short Iron Fence.png|50px]] | Iron Fence |{{Quotes |wilson = The scientific term is: "Sharp pointy thing". |willow = That looks sharp. |wolfgang = Is pointy spiky thing. |wendy = Looks dangerous. |wx78 = DECORATIVE SHARP OBJECT |wickerbottom = Wrought iron, it seems. |woodie = Yeesh. |maxwell = Spikey. Like me. |wigfrid = 'Tis a fencing spear. |webber = It looks sharp. |winona = Nice metalwork. |wortox = A wall, a wall, so very tall. |wormwood = Clinky sharp! |wurt = Look real pointy. |walter = The scientific term is: "Sharp pointy thing". |wanda = The scientific term is: "Sharp pointy thing". |choose = wilson }} | "quagmire_parkspike" |- |[[File:Iron Gate.png|50px]] | Iron Gate |{{Quotes |wilson = Turns out a key was the key to getting in. |willow = Didn't even have to melt the locks. |wolfgang = What nice things is in pink park? |wendy = Now I may enter the park. |wx78 = PARKING ACCESS: GRANTED |wickerbottom = We should have full access now. |woodie = In we go. |maxwell = Seems we've got it open. |wigfrid = Valhalla's gate is öpened tö me. |webber = Park. Park. Park! |winona = Can't keep me outta nothing. |wortox = This way to the park! |wormwood = Open now |wurt = Better be good stuff in here. |walter = Turns out a key was the key to getting in. |wanda = Turns out a key was the key to getting in. |choose = wilson |source = while opened }}
{{Quotes |wilson = Locked tight. |willow = I can't even burn it open! |wolfgang = Is needing key. |wendy = I need a key to enter. |wx78 = REQUIRES A PASSKEY |wickerbottom = It needs a key to open. |woodie = We need a key to open it. |maxwell = It needs a key. |wigfrid = Thöu shalt nöt keep me öut! |webber = It's locked. I think we need a key. |winona = Needs a key. |wortox = Let me out! Unwörthy öf mine attentiön. |webber = It's nice enough. |winona = Nice metalwork. |wortox = Nothing of interest to me, I see. |wormwood = Clinky stump |wurt = Not that interesting, florp. |walter = As far as posts go, this one is adequate. |wanda = As far as posts go, this one is adequate. |choose = wilson }} | "quagmire_altar_bollard" |} ==Stone Pillar== {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center; width: 100%" |- ! scope="col" style="width: 15%" | Picture ! scope="col" style="width: 15%" | Name ! scope="col" style="width: 55%" | Quotes ! scope="col" style="width: 15%" | Spawn Code |- | [[File:Stone Pillar.png|100px]] | Stone Pillar |{{Quotes |wilson = A monumental monument. |willow = It's stone. I can't burn it. |wolfgang = Wolfgang could lift it. |wendy = A monument. But not to Abigail. |wx78 = I ENJOY THE GEOMETRY OF THIS |wickerbottom = I wish I could read the writing. |woodie = A fine monument to something. |maxwell = It's a monument to death. |wigfrid = 'Tis a runestöne. |webber = It's a monument or something. |winona = Nice stonework. |wortox = Nothing fun to find here. |wormwood = Tall sharp stone |wurt = Big stone thing. |walter = A monumental monument. |wanda = A monumental monument. |choose = wilson }} | "quagmire_park_obelisk" |} ==Streetlight== {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center; width: 100%" |- ! scope="col" style="width: 15%" | Picture ! scope="col" style="width: 15%" | Name ! scope="col" style="width: 55%" | Quotes ! scope="col" style="width: 15%" | Spawn Code |- | [[File:The Gorge Streetlight.png|100px]] | Streetlight |{{Quotes |wilson = Huh. Reminds me of home. |willow = Just an old lamp post. |wolfgang = Wolfgang loves lamp. |wendy = It sheds light on nothing important. |wx78 = A POTENTIAL ALLY AGAINST THE ORGANICS |wickerbottom = What is it powered by, I wonder? |woodie = It don't have an off switch. |maxwell = A touch of civility. |wigfrid = Tis a magic light, surely. |webber = It's the kind of lamp they have in the city. |winona = That'd be a street lamp. Nope |wurt = Weird looking thing... |walter = Must have mis-spoke. |wanda = Must have mis-spoke. |choose = wilson }} | "quagmire_rubble_bike" |} ==Carts== {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center; width: 100%" |- ! scope="col" style="width: 15%" | Picture ! scope="col" style="width: 15%" | Name ! scope="col" style="width: 55%" | Quotes ! scope="col" style="width: 15%" | Spawn Code |- | [[File:Sammy Wagon.png|100px]] | Sammy's Wagon |{{Quotes |wilson = Any science in there? |willow = There's a lot of stuff to burn in there. |wolfgang = Wolfgang could lift it. |wendy = I, too, cart around my baggage. |wx78 = CONTAINER FOR GOODS |wickerbottom = Reminds me of my bookmobile days. |woodie = What's for sale today? |maxwell = Let's see what they have today. |wigfrid = 'Tis full öf göods. |webber = Do they have any toys? |winona = Anything good in there? |wortox = Anything fun inside? |wormwood = Junk trunk |wurt = Ooooh, what you have? |walter = Any science in there? |wanda = Any science in there? |choose = wilson }} | "quagmire_merm_cart1" |- | [[File:Pipton Cart.png|100px]] | Pipton's Cart |{{Quotes |wilson = I could use some stuff. |willow = I'd burn it, but I need the things in there. |wolfgang = Wolfgang could lift it. |wendy = Nothing in there could bring me happiness. |wx78 = THERE ARE GOODS WITHIN |wickerbottom = There are wares within. |woodie = Need some supplies, Lucy? |maxwell = Well what do we have here? |wigfrid = 'Tis full öf göods. |webber = That's full of good stuff. |winona = It's full of stuff I could use. |wortox = Mind if I take a little peek? |wormwood = Wheely Push Thing |wurt = You gimme stuff? |walter = I could use some stuff. |wanda = I could use some stuff. |choose = wilson }} | "quagmire_merm_cart2" |} {{The Gorge Content}}
